resume.summary:
Greetings, I am Mario Larsen.
Welcome to my online blog.
Would you like to gain deeper insights into my journey ?
resume.subTitle:
Youthful and accomplished French Engineer,
actively seeking enriching opportunities in AI research,
Web and Mobile Development, and Electronic Design
resume.subTitleFull: Youthful and accomplished French Engineer, actively seeking enriching opportunities in AI research, Web and Mobile Development, and Electronic Design

ensea.name: ENSEA, École Nationale Supérieure de l'Électronique et de ses Applications
ensea.text: Prestigious institution specializing in electrical engineering, computer science, and communication networks. Spearheaded lots of ambitious projects, including a Reinforcement Learning Solver and a Relation Network Video Classifier
ensea.result: Graduated with honors, majoring in signal processing and artificial intelligence

civ.name: CIV, Centre International de Valbonne
civ.text: Intensive preparatory program dedicated for competitive exams at top-tier French engineering schools (Grandes Écoles)
civ.result: Attained qualification for Centrale-Supélec, Mines-Télécom, and Concours Communs Polytechniques schools

parc.name: Parc Impérial
parc.result: Received Baccalaureate specializing in sciences with an emphasis on advanced mathematics, achieving honors equivalent to A-levels

galadrim.name: GALADRIM
galadrim.result: Developed and deployed 7 sophisticated web and mobile applications, showcasing versatility and proficiency

cea.name: CEA-LIST / DIASI: AI Department in Laboratory
cea.objective: Led the unification of detection and re-identification within an innovative deep network architecture for multifaceted object tracking
cea.result: Championed a groundbreaking visual transformer algorithm, surpassing baseline models in performance

ljubljana.name: University of Ljubljana
ljubljana.objective: Conducted an independent, comprehensive study and implementation of Virtual Try-On Networks
ljubljana.result: Generated a meticulously detailed technical report addressing CP-VTON failures, quality assessments, dataset analyses, and innovative updates

themis.name: ENSEA Laboratories, Themis
themis.text: Distinguished collaborative project assigned to a cohort of ENSEA students across three years of the engineering cycle
themis.objective: Championed the end-to-end design of an innovative electronic musical instrument, encompassing synthesizer and drum-machine functionalities
themis.result: Independently executed three PCB designs for the synthesizer's core board, demonstrating technical prowess and autonomous initiative

resume.interestText: Passionate about continuous learning, AI implementation, filmmaking, app development, neurology, mathematics, poetry, and associations

interests.text: because passionate about continuous learning, proactive creation, and effective knowledge sharing, my diverse interests include :

interestsList.implementation: AI implementation, futurism, and doomsday prediction
interestsList.development: Mobile game and web-app design, development, and innovation
interestsList.psl: Conducting engaging and enlightening PSL presentations
interestsList.film: Engaging in film direction, production, critique, and collaboration for academic and personal projects
interestsList.delegate: Exemplifying leadership as a dedicated school delegate and secretary
interestsList.running: Maintaining a rigorous routine of running and cycling
interestsList.association: Active participation in pivotal roles for various associations, spanning president, team manager, event organizer, and debate master for student life, international film festivals, gaming events, public debates, international conferences, and hackathons
interestsList.courses: Pursuing advanced coursework ranging from neurology and advanced mathematics to fundamental physics, poetry, and epistemology

portfolio.summary:
I have done lots of projects before this blog and I will try to list them all here. 
At some point, some may received there own page

mslab.title: MS4'S NEEDLE SERVO-CONTROL FOR DEPTH
mslab.text:
First real professional experience, this internship allowed me to discover in-depth the operation of a company.
The chance I had to be completely immersed in the role of an R&D engineer.
The project was to design, building and test a board to control the sampling needle depth for their MS4 blood analyzer.
In autonomy for 5 weeks, I was able to provide a functional analysis report, an Eagle board, a Spice simulation, a functional prototype and a test report.

themis.title: THEMIS FULL ANALOG BOARD
themis.text: Themis is a collaborative project theme proposed to a group of about twenty ENSEA students from the 3 years of the engineering cycle. The aim is to design from A to Z an electronic musical instrument of synthesizer/drum-machine type. During one semester, I worked autonomously on the synthesizer main board design. In the end, I provided 3 PCB designs compiling the research of many team members. The final designs was assemble and tested during the pandemic. More information about the Themis project : http://www-reynal.ensea.fr/?page_id=303

virtualTryOn.title: VIRTUAL TRY-ON NETWORKS STUDY
virtualTryOn.text: The university laboratory of Ljubljana studies artificial intelligence applied to visual processing. My goal during this internship was to reimplement some Virtual Try-On Networks and study them. I was asked to learn and report about their failures, quality measurement, dataset and updates be made. In autonomy for 15 weeks, I was able to compile more than 30 research papers and implement a lot of them in python and matlab.

pacman.title: AUTO PAC-MAN
pacman.text: To progress in AI, I develop 12 version of Pac-Man python environment. Some are adapted for human player and other for open ai training. Since I also wanted to understand deeply reinforcement learning, I rewrite the integrality of the code in tensorflow. Looking at the model behavior thanks to the render function of the environment, it successfully learn to avoid lots of walls and the ghost but I can see the limits.

sorting.title: SORTING ASSISTANT
sorting.text: Project carried out with a team of 4. Our prototype built for less than 2 € makes recycling simple and fun. A camera with a deep learning algorithm recognizes the waste kind and its materials and then displays the procedure to follow. An arduino controls the opening of the garbage cans concerned. We won the jury's prize for our fully functional prototype.

cloudModel.title: CLOUD FORMATION AND MODELING
cloudModel.text: Preparatory school project carried out to pass the national exams. 'What are the conditions of cloud formation?' a python program to represent in a new way a macro water particle evolving from the sea to the stratosphere. Score obtained : 19.5/20

tyo.title: TEAM MANAGEMENT, FESTIVAL ORGANIZATION AND POSTER DESIGN
tyo.text: Since its creation in 1991, TYO has been organizing every year a two-days short films festival. As a student association of the ENSEA, the team change every time. During 2019, we invited more than 40 international art school and 4 guests of honour. I was personally in charge of creating the poster with photoshop but I was also in the management, organization and communication team. I also used to screen three film a month for a year at the school in TYO name.

attenuator.title: AUDIO ATTENUATOR
attenuator.text: Small project carried out in pairs during half a semester. Among the most elementary manipulations of sound are amplification and attenuation. Our project is to produce such a system with the LM1971 M chip. The work is divided into four parts: - A computer phase allowing to control the chip via an Arduino card - An electronic phase for the PCB to communicate the composing - A do-it-yourself phase by ordering, printing, drilling, welding - A test phase to ensure efficiency and report improvements

snake.title: Snake Multiplayer
snake.text: Play Snake online with a friend. Made from HungryTurtleCode tutorial.

sudoku.title: Solver Sudoku
sudoku.text: This is my first ever program made during free time. I also made other related stuff around the general idea of solving the game of Sudoku.

solitaire.title: Solver Solitaire
solitaire.text: To find the probability that a given randomly generated game of Solitaire was winnable, I made a simple program to solve them.

nonogram.title: Solver Nonogram
nonogram.text: The objective of this project is to find a way to solve every nonogram and to generate new ones.

mastermind.title: Solver MasterMind
mastermind.text: MasterMind is a code-breaking game. The objective of this project is to find the best strategy to this game.

coinflip.title: Solver Coin Flip Cheaters
coinflip.text: Bot to win Coin Flip Cheaters: A game from Primer. It worked well but I think the game updated since last time I tried. Note that I was Number One for a few days thanks to this bot I made all by myself!

wikimpostor.title: Wikimpostor
wikimpostor.text: App to play the Wikimpostor game on Android. It's basically Two of this people are lying from The Technical Difficulties channel.

tetris.title: Tetris Mode
tetris.text: Play Tetris online but now with MODE you can check and uncheck to pimp up your game

minecraft.title: MineCraft Rhombic Dodecahedron
minecraft.text: A new iteration of Minecraft but with rhombic dodecahedron instead of cubes.

findwater.title: Find Water - The Game
findwater.text: Learn geography with a quiz game app in 3D. For now you can only tell if it's water or not but one day it'll be better, I swear... Since the beginning of this project I discovered Sebastian Lague, I just have to ripe of his latest game and make it worst.

zeta.title: Draw Zeta Riemann
zeta.text: Generate a picture of the Riemann Zeta function

youtubesubs.title: Draw Youtube Subs
youtubesubs.text: Generate a mosaic out of your subs
